nasb.text: And if anyone’s name was not found written in the book of life, he was thrown into the lake of fire.

esv.text: And if anyone’s name was not found written in the book of life, he was thrown into the lake of fire.

cnv.text: 凡是名字沒有記在生命冊上的，他就被拋在火湖裡。

ccb.text: 名字没有记在生命册上的都要被扔进火湖里。

csbs.text: 凡是名字没有被记在生命册上的人，都被丢进了火湖里。
